pageDescription: Calculate the payout amount for an annuity based on various factors including initial investment, interest rates, and payout period for retirement income planning

definition.title: Annuity Payout Definition
definition.description: Regular payments received from an annuity contract over a specified period or lifetime

immediateVsDeferred.title: Immediate vs Deferred Annuities
immediateVsDeferred.description: Immediate annuities begin payments soon after purchase; deferred annuities accumulate value before payouts

inflationImpact.title: Inflation Impact
inflationImpact.description: Fixed payments lose purchasing power over time due to inflation

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides annuity payout estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual annuity payouts may vary based on contract terms and market conditions

importantNotesList: Fixed annuities provide predictable income but may lose purchasing power to inflation
Variable annuities offer growth potential but come with investment risk
Consider inflation protection options when purchasing annuities
Annuity payments are typically taxed as ordinary income

messages.enterInformation: Enter your annuity information to calculate payout amounts
messages.resultMessage: Your annuity payout calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides annuity payout estimates based on mathematical formulas. Actual annuity payouts may vary based on contract terms, fees, market conditions, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized annuity payout analysis and retirement income planning, consult financial advisors or insurance professionals with expertise in annuity products and individual financial circumstances.

errors.annuityAmount: Please enter a valid annuity investment amount
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid expected annual interest rate
errors.payoutPeriod: Please enter a valid payout period

tooltips.annuityAmount: Total amount invested in the annuity
tooltips.interestRate: Expected annual interest rate or rate of return
tooltips.payoutPeriod: Length of time over which payments will be received
tooltips.payoutFrequency: How often payments will be received
tooltips.paymentTiming: Whether payments are received at beginning or end of period
tooltips.inflationAdjustment: Whether payments will be adjusted for inflation

enter_your_annuity_details_to_see_payout: Enter your annuity details to see payout results
detailed_breakdown_of_each_payment_perio: Detailed breakdown of each payment period (showing first 12 periods)
total_periods_download_csv_for_complete_:
total periods. Download CSV for complete
                      schedule.
calculate_amount_given_principal_rate_an: Calculate amount given principal, rate, and duration:
where_p_principal_rp_periodic_rate_n_tot: Where: P = Principal, r_p = Periodic Rate, N = Total Payments
calculate_given_principal_rate_and_payme: Calculate given principal, rate, and payment amount:
n_lnpmt_pmt_p_rp_ln1_rp_48: N = ln(PMT / (PMT - P × r_p)) / ln(1 + r_p)
where_pmt_payment_amount_p_principal_rp_: Where: PMT = Payment Amount, P = Principal, r_p = Periodic Rate
